title: Legacy Mouse Tweaks
description: A port of YaLTeR's Mouse Tweaks mod for Minecraft 1.8.9
body:
This mod, based on YaLTeR's Mouse Tweaks, introduces a couple changes to the functionality of the mouse in the inventory and in containers. The logic was ported from newer fabric versions to support legacy fabric for Minecraft 1.8.9.

Mouse Tweaks is purely client-side. There is no server-side component.

## Original Mod
For more information, visit the Mouse Tweak's page on Modrinth:
https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks

## Summary
In short, here are the features it adds (identical to Mouse Tweaks):
- RMB Tweak
- LMB Tweak (with item)
- LMB Tweak (without item)
- Wheel Tweak

## Permissions
just like Mouse Tweaks, feel free to include Legacy Mouse Tweaks in modpacks.
